results.title: CFD Analysis of Different Shape Rocket Nozzles - Springer
results.snippet: The two different nozzles which were studied in the present work are (a) the convergent-divergent nozzle and (b) the bell-shaped nozzle. The CFD analysis is carried out using ANSYS 22.0 software to obtain velocity, pressure, temperature, and the flow pattern.

results.title: Bell nozzle — Grokipedia
results.snippet: A Bell nozzle is a convergent-divergent exhaust nozzle used in rocket engines, characterized by its contoured, bell-shaped divergent section that efficiently expands and accelerates high-temperature, high-pressure combustion gases from subsonic speeds at the throat to supersonic velocities at the ex

results.title: Design and Analysis of Hybrid Propellant Rocket Motor C-D Bell-Shaped ...
results.snippet: Thus design and analysis of the rocket nozzle are critical and determine the success of a mission and capability of the rocket as a whole. Our research focuses on the design and analysis of a bell-shaped convergent-divergent (de Laval) nozzle.

results.title: Design of Rocket Nozzles — Notes for Propulsion
results.snippet: Design of Rocket Nozzles The nozzle is the most important component of the rocket engine. The nozzle converts high pressure, and ideally high temperature, gases into low pressure gases with much higher velocity by changing the cross-sectional area of the flow. results.title: Convergent Divergent Nozzle Design and Analysis to Increase Working ...
results.snippet: A convergent-divergent, or CD, nozzle is the name given to this arrangement of nozzles. The hot exhaust from the combustion chamber converges towards the nozzle's minimum area, or throat, in a CD rocket nozzle. The throat size is selected to restrict the flow and regulate the system's mass flow rate
